context: Evaluates implementation of bounded Levenshtein distance and fuzzy dictionary matching for MQL function name spellchecking. The candidate must implement the DP algorithm correctly, with early termination, and the two-strategy dictionary lookup.

checklist.name: Levenshtein correctness
checklist.description: levenshteinBounded returns the correct edit distance for various string pairs including identical strings (0), single substitutions (1), and multi-edit strings

checklist.name: Early termination on length
checklist.description: Returns Infinity immediately without full DP when string length difference exceeds maxDist

checklist.name: Infinity threshold
checklist.description: Returns Infinity when the computed distance exceeds maxDist (not just when lengths differ), enabling use as a filter without knowing the actual large distance

checklist.name: Match sorting
checklist.description: findClosestMatches returns results sorted by ascending distance as primary key and alphabetically as secondary key; results are capped at maxResults

checklist.name: Guard conditions
checklist.description: Returns empty array when word is already an exact match in dictionary, or when word is shorter than 3 characters; performs first-char strategy before adjacent-char fallback
